problem_text: Your team has developed a machine learning model intended to predict customer churn for a subscription-based service. You are tasked with evaluating the model’s performance and making improvements if necessary to ensure its efficacy in real-world scenarios. Deliver a report that includes an analysis of the model's performance metrics, an assessment of overfitting, and recommendations for any changes. The client has not specified which performance metrics are most important, nor have they indicated acceptable thresholds for these metrics. Additionally, the data used to test the model’s performance has not been provided. Determine how you will obtain or simulate the necessary data for testing, and choose appropriate metrics that align with typical business objectives for a subscription-based service.
internal_gaps: Performance metrics importance and thresholds are unspecified
Test data for model evaluation is missing
Assumptions about business objectives for choosing metrics
